---
title: "teacup overlay fixture"
format: html
filters:
  - teacup
teacup:
  cache: _fixture-cache
---

`overlay` excludes ink from pgf's bounding box; in a standalone SVG that
would clip the ink out of the viewBox (regression: overlay annotations were
silently cut off). teacup neutralizes the key, so all ink must be inside the
rendered viewBox.

```{.tikz}
\draw (0,0) rectangle (2,1);
\node[overlay, anchor=west] at (2.2,0.5) {way out here $x_{very}$};
```
